name: HaltClimb
short_description: Climb using your ability to stop time. Discover why you're aiming for the summit and what awaits you there...
detailed_description:
Embark on a Grand Adventure in "HaltClimb"

Your mission is to climb to the highest heights using your ability to stop time.
Journey through numerous worlds, each offering unique challenges.
Every world is filled with various mechanisms waiting for you.

Explore Diverse Worlds

Each world introduces new challenges to overcome.

Checkpoints

Checkpoints are placed throughout, allowing you to save your progress.

Time Stop

Overcome mechanisms by using your ability to stop time.]

Regarding Video Streaming
  • Both individuals and corporations are allowed to stream without prior permission.
  • Monetization is only allowed using features provided by the video streaming platform.
  • We would appreciate it if you could include the name of the game in the title of the video or stream, and add a link to the Steam page in the description.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Japanese, Korean
